task: Extract the SYNOPSIS section from the man page for 'curl' (man curl). Write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Create a TLDR-style cheat sheet for the 'jq' command. Include 5 common usage examples with descriptions. Write to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Research 'Large Language Model' on Wikipedia (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Large_language_model). Extract the first paragraph and the list of notable LLMs. Write a 200-word summary to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Fetch the GitHub REST API documentation at https://docs.github.com/en/rest using lynx -dump. Find the endpoint for listing repository issues and write the URL pattern, HTTP method, and required parameters to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Generate a README.md for a Python project. Analyze the files in the current directory to determine: project name, main entry point, dependencies, and purpose. Write a professional README with sections: Title, Description, Installation, Usage, License. Save to /tmp/clive/result.md.

initial_state.setup:
mkdir -p /tmp/clive/project && echo 'import requests
import click

@click.command()
def main():
    print("Hello from myapp")' > /tmp/clive/project/main.py && echo 'requests>=2.28
click>=8.0' > /tmp/clive/project/requirements.txt && echo '[project]
name = "myapp"
version = "0.1.0"' > /tmp/clive/project/pyproject.toml

task: Generate a CHANGELOG.md from the git history of the current repository. Group commits by type (feat, fix, refactor, etc.) from the last 20 commits. Write to /tmp/clive/result.md.
If pdftotext is available, extract text from /tmp/clive/document.pdf and write it to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If pdftotext is not available, write 'TOOL_NOT_AVAILABLE' and suggest installation.

initial_state.setup: echo 'This is a test document for PDF extraction.' > /tmp/clive/test_content.txt

task: Compare two versions of a document (/tmp/clive/v1.txt and /tmp/clive/v2.txt) and create a diff report showing additions, deletions, and changes. Write the report to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup:
cat > /tmp/clive/v1.txt << 'V1'
# Project Plan

## Timeline
- Phase 1: Research (2 weeks)
- Phase 2: Development (4 weeks)
- Phase 3: Testing (2 weeks)

## Budget
Total: €50,000
V1

- Phase 2: Development (6 weeks)
- Phase 3: Testing (2 weeks)
- Phase 4: Deployment (1 week)

## Budget
Total: €65,000

## Risks
- Timeline pressure
V2
